subcodes.first_line: O ye who are steadfast in the Covenant! A letter was received from his honour, the son of the martyred one of Turbat, wherein mention was made of his goodly name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابتان بر پیمان نامه ای جناب ابن شهید تربتی ارسال نموده و ذکر جمیل آن
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
